case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. SMITH, DANIELLE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, DANIELLE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-23-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-30-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON NOV-30-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

9:00AM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLAINTIFF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFENDANT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, DANIELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1073 CONNECTICUT ST. S.F, CA. 94107 $1,436.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,436.20, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS COSTS PER COST BILL.
